use_codes.desc: TAFINLAR IS INDICATED, IN COMBINATION WITH TRAMETINIB, FOR THE TREATMENT OF PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 YEAR OF AGE AND OLDER WITH LOW-GRADE GLIOMA (LGG) WITH A BRAF V600E MUTATION WHO REQUIRE SYSTEMIC THERAPY
